missing_credentials: Please enter your login and password.
unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
internal_error: Internal server error. Please try again.
layout_not_found: The selected layout no longer exists.
layout_name_taken: A layout with this name already exists.
default_layout_immutable: The default layout cannot be renamed.
default_layout_undeletable: The default layout cannot be deleted.
default_layout_cannot_be_locked: The default layout cannot be locked.
interlocking_not_found: The selected interlocking no longer exists.
interlocking_name_taken: An interlocking with this name already exists.
interlocking_not_in_layout: This interlocking is not on the active layout.
not_signalman: You don't have signalman rights on this layout.
layout_mismatch: The request targets a different layout than your session.
